news_past_7_days.title: Q3 earnings will be 'validation moment' for AI spend: Dan Ives
news_past_7_days.summary: Big Tech heavy hitters will report their third quarter earnings in the coming October weeks, which will give Wall Street a better sense of how much these companies are investing in AI and artificial intelligence infrastructures. Wedbush Securities managing director and global head of technology research Dan Ives discusses how investors are still underestimating the AI super cycle propelling markets (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) higher. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

news_past_7_days.title: Shutdown, China cracks down on Nvidia, Oil prices
news_past_7_days.summary: The US Government shutdown continues to rumble on with little sign of letting up, China begins cracking down on Nvidia (NVDA) chips being imported into the country and Oil (CL=F) prices stumble after peace appears to be agreed in the Middle East.

news_past_7_days.title: Trump Adds 100% China Tariff After Stock Market Dives, But Doesn't Do This; Oracle, Tesla, Taiwan Semi In Focus
news_past_7_days.summary: The stock market tumbled with President Trump imposing huge China tariffs after the close. Oracle, JPMorgan, Taiwan Semi are on tap. Is Tesla's chart healthy?

news_past_7_days.title: The Old-School Tech CEO Leading Nvidia’s Main Rival
news_past_7_days.summary: AMD’s Lisa Su is an “engineer’s engineer” who just muscled in on the battle for the newest technology in the world.

news_past_7_days.title: Lisa Su has built AMD into a $378 billion microchip titan. So why isn't she richer?
news_past_7_days.summary: Lisa Su has overseen a 7,000% rise in AMD shares as CEO, yet she has less than 1% of Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's wealth.

news_past_7_days.title: Applied Digital Is The Latest AI Infrastructure Stock To Catch Fire
news_past_7_days.summary: Applied Digital stock leaped on Friday after the operator of data centers for artificial intelligence reported a big surge in revenue in its latest quarter.

news_past_7_days.title: Why is Nvidia, the world’s leading AI chipmaker, entangled in the US-China trade war?
news_past_7_days.summary: Tech giant Nvidia has been caught in the middle of international trade tensions as the standoff between the United States and China continues to escalate.
